title: Mouse Genotyping with KAPA Kit in 2 Hours (#KK7302)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6t4hg","text":"This protocol uses KAPA Mouse Genotyping kit (#KK7302)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Collect mouse tissues (ear or tail clips) into PCR strips.
Make 100 µL extration buffer mix for each sample. %s %s

Add 100 µL buffer into each tissue sample and run the reaction as follows: 75 °C 00:15:00 95 °C 00:05:00 4 °C 00:00:00 Tissues are visible or intact after extraction (this is normal). Vortex DNA extract and spin down before PCR.
Make 20 µL PCR master mix for each sample. %s %s
Run the reaction as follows: 95 °C 00:03:00 35 cycles 95 °C 00:00:15 57 °C, adjustable 00:00:15 72 °C 00:00:10, per kb 35 cycles 4 °C 00:00:00
Take 10 µL PCR reaction and run DNA gel.
creator: Cq Wu
